title: codereview-pass1-sfn-kconfig
description: Reviewed SFN paragraph+example and Kconfig chunk. Findings: P3 wording in delta example could reference exact test vector ID; Kconfig help references DEFCON but could link specific section. No P0-P2. Tagged codereview. Addressed in follow-up.

West build validated Kconfig/selects (native_sim target); tests/vectors referenced. No dead code. Followed draft/IETF style. Conventional commit created.
